❓ Frequently Asked Questions

How is EMI calculated?
EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), where P = principal, r = monthly interest rate, n = total months. Our calculator does this instantly for you.
What are current home loan interest rates in India?
Home loan rates in India range from 8.35% to 10.50% p.a. depending on the bank, your credit score (CIBIL), and loan amount. SBI offers rates from 8.50%, HDFC from 8.60%.
Can prepayment reduce my EMI?
Yes! Partial prepayment reduces your outstanding principal, which lowers either your EMI or tenure. Most banks allow it with minimal charges. RBI mandates no prepayment penalty on floating rate loans.
Is LucoVista really free?
100% free! No sign-up, no hidden fees. We're supported by ads and generous donors. Use all calculators unlimited times. ❤️
